prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `a59b95c0`.
codex_response:
Rule: count the distinct colors in the 3x3 input, then tile the entire input grid that many times across and down. I used the summary hint because it matched all official examples; no correction note or new primitive was needed.

Implemented the task package at [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a59b95c0/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a59b95c0/verifier.py), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_a59b95c0/generator.py). The generator stays in-family by producing dense nonzero 3x3 inputs with exactly 2, 3, or 4 colors, then constructing the output by exact grid tiling rather than using the verifier as a wrapper.

Validation passed end-to-end: official examples `6/6`, generated examples `1000/1000`. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a59b95c0/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a59b95c0/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a59b95c0/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a59b95c0/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/a59b95c0/previews/preview_03.png). I also opened a generated preview and it looks visually consistent with the official family: dense 3x3 motifs tiled into 6x6, 9x9, and 12x12 outputs.
